'''Omeddyl''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Rhinnal system/Legends|Rhinnal system]]. Positioned just beyond the [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid field]], it was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] with 18 [[Moon/Legends|moons]], and one of two such planets in the star system.<ref name="Core Worlds" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-01-XX -->''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''
